i18n.en: like verbose but report only when a change is made
i18n.zh-CN: 只在所有者实际变更时报告

i18n.en: output a diagnostic for every file processed
i18n.zh-CN: 对每个文件都输出处理结果

i18n.en: affect the referent of each symbolic link (this is the default), rather than the symbolic link itself
i18n.zh-CN: 对符号链接的目标做修改（默认）

i18n.en: affect symbolic links instead of  any  referenced  file  (useful only on systems that can change the ownership of a symlink)
i18n.zh-CN: 对符号链接本身做修改

i18n.en: change  the  owner and/or group of each file only if its current owner and/or group match those specified here.   Either  may  be omitted,  in  which case a match is not required for the omitted attribute
i18n.zh-CN: 只在当前 owner/group 匹配时才修改
拒绝在 / 上递归操作

i18n.en: use RFILE's owner and group rather than  specifying  OWNER:GROUP values.  RFILE is always dereferenced.
i18n.zh-CN: 把所有者改成与 RFILE 相同

i18n.en: operate on files and directories recursively

i18n.zh-CN: 递归时跟随命令行上的符号链接
递归时跟随所有符号链接
递归时不跟随任何符号链接（默认）
